title: TVS Supply Chain Solutions is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: TVS Supply Chain Solutions is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TVS Supply Chain Solutions:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Supply Chain Solutions!
